---
id: register-whatsapp-cloud
title: How To Register Whatsapp Cloud
sidebar_position: 1
---
Document Langkah Langkah re-register whatsapp cloud

1.  Get phone number
    1.  [https://graph.facebook.com/v22.0/1090017878107349/phone\_numbers?access\_token=EAANRTamcJV0BO6CZA0OMK3dMqdv3NxaMLtJW4e0RKnjUtPUzDPhxWQIrJ4sYTJtitMZAWLvogq1AeihcXOpGQuWxehPl1ocHX4r1ShfBxWSugCbLnqHeVGKbMOeNXUgy87iss9Wbe1sZCM0uZBzc6y8HAcQs7zgCVZATb9E3VZBkt1PMNh981ZCApH8nx0gtn6G](https://graph.facebook.com/v22.0/1090017878107349/phone_numbers?access_token=EAANRTamcJV0BO6CZA0OMK3dMqdv3NxaMLtJW4e0RKnjUtPUzDPhxWQIrJ4sYTJtitMZAWLvogq1AeihcXOpGQuWxehPl1ocHX4r1ShfBxWSugCbLnqHeVGKbMOeNXUgy87iss9Wbe1sZCM0uZBzc6y8HAcQs7zgCVZATb9E3VZBkt1PMNh981ZCApH8nx0gtn6G)
        1.  V22.0 didapat dari version facebook
        2.  1090017878107349 didapat dari WABA ID (tergantung permintaan)
        3.  Access token EAANRTamcJV0BO6CZA0OMK3dMqdv3NxaMLtJW4e0RKnjUtPUzDPhxWQIrJ4sYTJtitMZAWLvogq1AeihcXOpGQuWxehPl1ocHX4r1ShfBxWSugCbLnqHeVGKbMOeNXUgy87iss9Wbe1sZCM0uZBzc6y8HAcQs7zgCVZATb9E3VZBkt1PMNh981ZCApH8nx0gtn6G
    2.  Copy id nomor yang akan di re-register 601754839690894

![](data:image/png;base64,)

1.  Get phone number by id
    1.  https://graph.facebook.com/v22.0/601754839690894
        1.  melihat isi dari nomor yang akan di ganti
2.  ![](data:image/png;base64,)Register phone
    1.  [https://graph.facebook.com/v22.0/601754839690894/register](https://graph.facebook.com/v22.0/601754839690894/register)
        1.  Isi authorization dengan token

![](data:image/png;base64,)

![](data:image/png;base64,)

![](data:image/png;base64,)

1.  Nomor whatsapp sudah berhasil diganti dilihat dari verified\_name

![](data:image/png;base64,)
